siem_hunt_queries.name: Valid Account Abuse Detection
siem_hunt_queries.query: EventCode=4624 LogonType IN (10, 3) | bucket _time span=1h | stats dc(TargetUserName) as unique_users, count by src_ip, _time | where unique_users > 5 OR count > 50
siem_hunt_queries.purpose: Detect credential stuffing or valid account abuse patterns
